metadata.title: Municipal Public Space Enforcement Data Assets
metadata.description: Starter catalog of key business, PII, and security-sensitive data assets for the Municipal Public Space Enforcement domain.

assets.name: Customer Profile
assets.description: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.
assets.accessScope: customer-facing journeys and approved internal operations
assets.businessMeaning: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.

assets.name: Customer Contact Point
assets.description: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.
assets.businessMeaning: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.

interfaces.name: customer-contact-point api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Customer Contact Point.

assets.name: Consent Record
assets.description: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.
assets.businessMeaning: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.

assets.name: Identity Credential
assets.description: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.
assets.businessMeaning: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.

assets.name: Session Token
assets.description: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.
assets.businessMeaning: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.

assets.name: Access Policy
assets.description: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.
assets.businessMeaning: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.

assets.name: Audit Log
assets.description: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.
assets.businessMeaning: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.

assets.name: Payment Instrument Reference
assets.description: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.

interfaces.name: payment-instrument-reference api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Payment Instrument Reference.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Transaction
assets.description: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Solar And Power Reliability
assets.description: Maintains stable power profiles for field units deployed in low-infrastructure environments.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Solar and Power Reliability.

interfaces.name: solar-and-power-reliability api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Solar And Power Reliability.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Edge Camera And Sensor Unit
assets.description: The movable field hardware surface that captures suspicious activity and media evidence in selected public-space zones.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Edge Camera and Sensor Unit.

interfaces.name: edge-camera-and-sensor-unit api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Edge Camera And Sensor Unit.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Incident Detection Rules
assets.description: Evaluates field signals and media events to identify suspicious activity likely to represent a municipal offence or nuisance incident.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Incident Detection Rules.

interfaces.name: incident-detection-rules api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Incident Detection Rules.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Geospatial Incident Map
assets.description: Maps incidents, tasks, recurrence, and deployment footprint across the municipal territory.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Geospatial Incident Map.

interfaces.name: geospatial-incident-map api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Geospatial Incident Map.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Evidence Vault And Chain Of Custody
assets.description: Stores evidence, metadata, timestamps, and provenance needed to support enforceable municipal procedures.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Evidence Vault and Chain of Custody.

interfaces.name: evidence-vault-and-chain-of-custody api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Evidence Vault And Chain Of Custody.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Fine Recovery And Treasury Integration
assets.description: Tracks sanctions and payment state and connects enforcement outcomes to treasury or municipal finance workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Fine Recovery and Treasury Integration.

interfaces.name: fine-recovery-and-treasury-integration api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Fine Recovery And Treasury Integration.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Enforcement Case
assets.description: Organizes incidents, evidence, people, case state, and actions into one municipal case record.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Enforcement Case.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Deployment Planning And Site Selection
assets.description: Prioritizes which public-space hotspots should be instrumented, how long equipment should remain in place, and when a site should be moved or escalated.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Deployment Planning and Site Selection.

interfaces.name: deployment-planning-and-site-selection api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Deployment Planning And Site Selection.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

stores.description: Primary operational database for Customer Profile.

stores.description: Primary operational database for Customer Contact Point.
